Game.Name: Shin Momotarou Densetsu (Japan) (Rev 1)
Game.plot: Overview:Shin Momotarou Densetsu ("New Momotaro Legend") is a traditional RPG for the Super Famicom featuring Momotaro, the famous "peach boy" of Japanese folklore. The game's story continues where the previous game, 1990's Momotarou Densetsu II for the PC Engine, leaves off. Momotaro returns home to his adoptive parents while the demons he's foiled previously continue to plot against him.Shin Momotarou Densetsu would be the last Momotarou Densetsu game until a GBC compilation in 2001.
Game.Notes: The game's story continues where the previous game, 1990's Momotarou Densetsu II for the PC Engine, leaves off. Momotaro returns home to his adoptive parents while the demons he's foiled previously continue to plot against him.
